query: I need to review a large PR that touches authentication, payments, and the API layer. I want security, performance, and code quality reviews done simultaneously.
Set up a pipeline where research feeds into design which feeds into implementation and then testing.
I have 30 files that all need the same lint fix applied independently. How do I orchestrate agents to do this fast?
I want to research caching best practices and then implement them. How should I structure the agents?
This database migration is risky. I need to see and approve a plan before any code gets written. How do I set up agent orchestration for this?
I need to refactor code across 4 files where the test file depends on all other refactors finishing first. What orchestration pattern handles fan-in dependencies?
I have a 20,000-line log file that's too big to analyze at once. How do I use agents to process it in chunks?
How do I create a team with a researcher and an implementer?
Send a message to all teammates telling them to stop working
Create a task for the frontend agent to fix the login page
How do I shut down my agent team cleanly when they finish?
What's the factory pattern and when should I use it in my codebase?
How do I switch from in-process to tmux spawn backend?
My teammate crashed during a task, how do I recover the stuck work?
